## Summary

Describe the change and the affected public packages.

## Testing

- [ ] Backend tests pass when backend code changed
- [ ] Frontend tests/typecheck pass when frontend code changed
- [ ] Python wheel/sdist or npm package contents were checked
- [ ] Reference consumer was checked when the shared contract changed

## Contract Checklist

- [ ] Public API and HTTP changes are documented
- [ ] English and Russian documentation/copy remain complete
- [ ] User-model ownership and migrations were considered
- [ ] Browser-cookie and bearer flows were considered
- [ ] Local and published dependency modes remain separate

## Security

- [ ] JWT, sessions, refresh rotation/replay and logout were considered
- [ ] Cookies, CSRF, redirects and OAuth state/PKCE/linking were considered
- [ ] No credentials, raw tokens, local paths or production data are included
